name: Trestle
description: Trestle provides identity-data APIs including Real Contact, Phone Validation, Reverse Phone and Caller Identification, helping fintechs and marketers verify, enrich and score customer contact data.

seo.title: Trestle — KYC / KYB / AML API
seo.meta_description: Trestle: Trestle provides identity-data APIs including Real Contact, Phone Validation, Reverse Phone and Caller Identification, helping fintechs and marketers v

when_to_use: Phone number validation API for contact data quality
Reverse phone lookup for identity enrichment at onboarding
Real Contact API for live person verification at signup
Caller identification for fraud signal enrichment
Phone and email risk scoring for fintech KYC workflows

pros: Phone validation and reverse-phone data APIs
Real Contact scores contactability not just identity
Useful for both fintechs and marketers
cons: Not a full KYC or AML provider
US-centric data depth versus global coverage
Overlap with carrier-lookup APIs like Twilio
review.verdict: Phone and contact data API that complements KYC; don't mistake it for a full identity vendor.
review.best_for: Fintechs and growth teams validating, enriching and scoring phone-based customer contact data
review.not_for: Compliance teams looking for document verification, sanctions screening or full KYC workflows
